name: Special Chic Badger
description: A distinctive badger named for the two lone manes that drape from either side of its shoulders. Though it may look rather adorable when rolling about on the ground, the Chic Badger is in fact a highly capable hunter, capable of sudden bursts of speed that are difficult to evade. Once angered, shaking it off can be no easy task.\nThe manes along its back shift in color under the influence of kuuvahki. This particular Chic Badger exhibits more pronounced Electro traits, likely the result of its long residence at Thunderclap Reef, where unusual thunderstorms frequently occur.
